description.value: Price 30,000 gp; Slot feet; CL 11th; Weight 2 lbs.; Aura moderate enchantment DESCRIPTION These boots are made of fine white leather tooled with scenes of epic battles. Once per day as a move action, the wearer can affect himself with greater heroism for 11 minutes. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 15,000 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells greater heroism, remove fear
